title: Yellow
description: A romantic song about unconditional devotion and love written for a partner

title: Fix You
description: A comforting ballad about healing grief and offering support to someone you love

title: The Scientist
description: A melancholic piano-driven breakup song told in reverse about regret and loss

title: Blinding Lights
description: An energetic 80s-inspired synth track about needing someone desperately in the night

title: Shape of You
description: A danceable pop song about physical attraction and falling in love at a bar

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
description: An epic rock opera with multiple movements telling a story of guilt and redemption

title: Hotel California
description: A classic rock song with mysterious and dark lyrics about excess and being trapped

title: Imagine
description: A peaceful anthem imagining a world of unity brotherhood and peace without borders

title: Smells Like Teen Spirit
description: The defining grunge anthem of the 90s expressing teenage apathy and rebellion

title: Rolling in the Deep
description: A powerful breakup anthem with soulful vocals about betrayal and wasted potential
